Enquiry.notes: ServiceJob.enquiry_id present; Quote.enquiry_id present. Direct sale→enquiry conversion not yet automated.

Deal.notes: ServiceJob.deal_id present (Module 6). Quote does not yet carry deal_id directly.

Invoice.notes: Invoice.quote_id, ServiceJob.invoice_id already present. No duplicate billing layer introduced.

Payment.notes: Payment canonical entity unchanged. FSM has no separate payment flow.

ServicePlanVisit.notes: ServicePlanVisit connected via ServicePlan→ServiceAgreement chain. Direct sale→visit scheduling not yet automated.

Equipment.notes: ServiceJob.covered_equipment_id links to Equipment. Sale→equipment record auto-creation deferred to fieldservice_sale_agreement_equipment_stock module.

InstalledEquipment.notes: InstalledEquipment.customer_id present. Sale-driven install record creation deferred to equipment_stock module.

SiteAsset.notes: SiteAsset creation from sold equipment deferred to fieldservice_sale_agreement_equipment_stock module.

EquipmentWarranty.notes: Warranty activation from sold equipment deferred to fieldservice_sale_agreement_equipment_stock module.

Premises.notes: Quote.premises_id added. ServiceJob.premises_id already present. Job creation from quote propagates premises.

Building / Unit.notes: Sub-premises hierarchy (building/unit) linkage from sale deferred to a future pass.

SchedulingSurfaceProvider.notes: Sale-created ServiceJobs are immediately visible on the scheduling surface via ServiceJob entity type already registered. No additional wiring needed.

BusinessSuiteCalendarAdapter.notes: Calendar adapter aggregates ServiceJob; sale-generated jobs appear automatically.

DispatchRoute.notes: DispatchRoute (Module 11) already consumes ServiceJob. Sale-generated jobs enter routing pool automatically.

RepairOrder.notes: ServiceJob→RepairOrder chain exists (Module 9+10). Sale-originated jobs can generate repair orders via existing ServiceRepairRequired event. No additional wiring needed here.

duplicates_detected.description: Odoo sale.order maps to both Quote (pre-approval) and potentially a separate 'order' entity. In TitanZero we use Quote as the canonical pre-execution commercial document. No separate order table introduced.
duplicates_detected.resolution: Quote is canonical. QuoteItem.field_service_tracking carries tracking behaviour.

future_merge_candidates.reason: Equipment stock movement from sold agreement lines. Connects sale→InstalledEquipment, SiteAsset, and EquipmentWarranty activation.
Recurring sale line → automatic ServicePlan generation with rrule/frequency from quote line data.
Purchase order (already Module 2) may need quote/sale linkage for parts procurement from sold jobs.

isolated_sale_logic_remaining: None. All sale-to-service logic routes through canonical Quote, QuoteItem, ServiceJob, ServiceAgreement, ServicePlan entities.
